title: A star-like UFO was spotted moving vertically in Ceilândia-DF [1995]
excerpt: MAY 16th, 1995. Time: 20h05. Duration: not determined. In Ceilandia, Distrito Federal, several people spotted an unidentified flying object with a round shape, red in color and appeared to be “the size of the Morning Star” when seen in the sky. text_preview:
MAY 16th, 1995. Time: 20h05. Duration: not determined. In Ceilandia, Distrito Federal, several people spotted an unidentified flying object with a round shape, red in color and appeared to be “the size of the Morning Star” when seen in the sky. According to witnesses, the UFO was moving vertically, descending slowly from a high altitude. The sighting was carried out with binoculars in a clear sky.

Cf. ARQUIVO NACIONAL (Brasil). Sistema de Informações do Arquivo Nacional (SIAN). Fundo ‘Objeto Voador Não Identificado (OVNI)’. Código de Referência BR DFANBSB ARX.0.0.396. “Questionário sobre a oc
summary: Several witnesses in Ceilândia-DF observed a red star-sized round UFO descending slowly vertically through binoculars on May 16, 1995.
